calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Trust
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ravi Patel, via Zoom, for and with Margaret Greene, Petitioner.

The court mentions the previous continuances of this matter to allow Joel Gargaritano the opportunity to hire counsel and/or file objections, with a deadline of Apr-29-2022. No objections have been filed and Mr. Patel confirms that he has not been contacted by Mr. Gargaritano. The court and Mr. Patel discuss taking the related probate petition (PES-20-303990) off calendar. The court advises that the real property will be removed from the related probate estate once this matter is granted. The court advises that it intends to grant this petition.

After additional discussion, the First Amended Verified Petition, etc., is taken under submission. The petition in the related probate matter stated above is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Verified Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Continued To May-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ravi Patel, via zoom, for Margaret Greene, Petitioner; Joel Gargaritano, via zoom, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court confirms with Mr. Gargaritano that he has not been able to secure the services of an attorney as of the calling of this matter and reminds him regarding missing the deadlines for filing an objection that were ordered by the court at the previous calling of this matter. Mr. Gargaritano requests another continuance so that he can continue to search for an attorney. Mr. Patel requests that the court deny the request to continue and take the petition under submission.

After additional discussion, the court is allowing one more continuance to May-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Gargaritano is instructed to file any objection, whether or not he has hired an attorney, by Apr-29-2022. If Mr. Gargaritano hires an attorney, he is instructed to advise his attorney regarding the filing deadline. Additionally, the hearing set for Apr-18-2022 in the related Estate Matter (PES-20-303990) is continued in open court to May-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

Verified Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Mar-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ravi Patel, via ZOOM, for Margaret Greene, Petitioner; Joel Gargaritano, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court initially confirms with Mr. Gargaritano that he is not appearing to object to the instant petition with Mr. Gargaritano stating that he does not want to sell the real property, where he currently lives. The court advises Mr. Gargaritano that he should discuss the preceding with the other parties in this matter and strongly suggests that he hire an attorney. The court explains the nature of today's proceedings to Mr. Gargaritano. The court points to a threshold issue regarding venue and the principal location of Administration and advises that it appears as though venue is proper. The court then advises the parties that it will be continuing this matter to Mar-29-2022 to allow Mr. Gargaritano the opportunity to formally file an objection to this matter or hire an attorney. The court advises Mr. Gargaritano to file papers by Mar-18-2022.

The Verified Petition for an Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to Mar-29-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Continued To Feb-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
